Local Business/Campaign Spotlight
We Three Bears - Personalised Baby Clothing, Gifts & Accessories
2 December 2024

I visited We Three Bears who are based in Attleborough. They recently opened their shop at 10 Church Street where they make specialised personalised gifts and clothing for babies, children and adults.
Business Spotlight – Hannah Art
30 November 2023

One of the joys of my weekly constituency visits is getting to meet inspirational people – which is why it is such a delight for me to spotlight ‘Hannah Art’, the wonderful business set up by fourteen year old Hannah Fewell, whom I recently met at Banham Zoo’s brilliant ‘Christmas Enterprise Festival’.
Cranswick Country Foods – Vacancies
14 June 2023

Further to the brilliant Wayland Chamber of Commerce Jobs Fair in Watton that I helped support with local councillors and the DWP, I am delighted to helped showcase some of the local job opportunities on offer right here in Mid Norfolk.
Watton Jobs Fair – Friday 2nd June – 10am-2pm – Queens Memorial Hall, Watton

Are you an upcoming school leaver, someone in search of a job, or even someone just looking for a new exciting career or opportunity?

Are you a local business interested in speaking to LOCAL people about opportunities in their area.

Then Wayland Chamber of Commerce want to hear from YOU!
Mid Norfolk Railway – Emergency ‘Back On Track’ Appeal
28 March 2023

The ’Back On Track’ Emergency Appeal aims to raise £95,000 that, when combined with the funds already raised by the MNR, will hopefully allow the railway to reopen on a staged basis from the summer.
Norwich Jobs Fair

Looking to get back into work or change your career?

The Norwich Jobs Fair will be taking place between 10am-1pm on Wednesday 13th July at the Forum in the Norwich.

No registration is required. You can just turn up and talk to companies from various sectors and industries.  It is completely free to come along
Wymondham Food and Drink Festival 2022

Wymondham Food and Drink Festival 2022 will take place on Sunday 26th June between 10am-4pm. The event promises local and East Anglian culinary delights including hot food, street food, artisan foods and more.
North Elmham Tennis Club
9 May 2022

Award-winning North Elmham Tennis Club, located near to Dereham and Fakenham, offers year-round coaching, tournaments and social play for all ages and abilities.
Mid Norfolk RSPCA Charity Golf Day

Local businesses the RSPCA Mid Norfolk and North Suffolk branch needs you!
Norwich Jobs Fair
20 April 2022

Looking to get back into work or change your career?

The Norwich Jobs Fair will be taking place between 10am-1pm on Wednesday 20th April at the Forum in the Norwich.

No registration is required. You can just turn up and talk to companies from various sectors and industries.  It is completely free to come along

George Freeman MP
Rooms 333-335
Breckland Business Centre
St Withburga Lane
Dereham
Norfolk, NR19 1FD

Telephone:
01953 600617

email:
george.freeman.mp@parliament.uk


Breckland District: All Saints, Buckenham, Burgh and Haverscroft, Dereham Central, Dereham Humbletoft, Dereham Neatherd, Dereham Toftwood, Eynsford, Haggard De Toni, Hermitage, Launditch, Necton, Queen's, Shipdham, Springvale and Scarning, Swanton Morley, Taverner, Templar, Two Rivers, Upper Wensum, Upper Yare, Watton, and Wissey; South Norfolk District: Abbey, Cromwells, Hingham and Deopham, Northfields, Rustens, Town, and Wicklewood.
